---
title: "Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure"
---

# Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure

Range: `1351-1420`.

## Completion

| Status      | Count |
| ----------- | ----- |
| authored    | 14    |
| stub        | 48    |
| needs_sense | 8     |

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| Sigil | Term                                                | Completion  | Summary                                                                                              |
| ----- | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1351  | [agent {AI}](#rune-1351)                            | authored    | A named locus of initiative that may observe, decide, and invoke tools.                              |
| 1352  | `STUB` [alignment {AI}](#rune-1352)                 | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1353  | `STUB` [annotation set](#rune-1353)                 | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1354  | `STUB` [benchmark prompt](#rune-1354)               | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1355  | `STUB` [canonical form {AI}](#rune-1355)            | stub        | A normalization word; many possible surfaces are forced into one agreed shape.                       |
| 1356  | `STUB` [citation](#rune-1356)                       | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1357  | `STUB` [clause marker](#rune-1357)                  | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1358  | [constraint {AI}](#rune-1358)                       | authored    | A bound that removes degrees of freedom in favor of correctness.                                     |
| 1359  | [context](#rune-1359)                               | authored    | The surrounding facts that give the prompt its force.                                                |
| 1360  | [context window](#rune-1360)                        | needs_sense | A horizon word; it marks how much text the model can keep active at once.                            |
| 1361  | `STUB` [delegation](#rune-1361)                     | stub        | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.         |
| 1362  | `STUB` [deterministic decoding](#rune-1362)         | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1363  | `STUB` [embedding {AI}](#rune-1363)                 | stub        | A closeness word; it places meaning into geometry.                                                   |
| 1364  | [evaluation {AI}](#rune-1364)                       | authored    | The act of measuring whether the model is actually useful.                                           |
| 1365  | `STUB` [evaluator](#rune-1365)                      | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1366  | `STUB` [example](#rune-1366)                        | stub        | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.         |
| 1367  | `STUB` [exemplar](#rune-1367)                       | stub        | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                    |
| 1368  | `STUB` [fallback {AI}](#rune-1368)                  | stub        | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.         |
| 1369  | `STUB` [few-shot](#rune-1369)                       | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1370  | `STUB` [fine-tuning](#rune-1370)                    | stub        | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.         |
| 1371  | `STUB` [function call](#rune-1371)                  | stub        | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                    |
| 1372  | [goal](#rune-1372)                                  | needs_sense | An aim word; it tells the spell what outcome matters most.                                           |
| 1373  | [grounding](#rune-1373)                             | authored    | Tie generation to evidence instead of to free-association alone.                                     |
| 1374  | [guardrail](#rune-1374)                             | authored    | A boundary that narrows allowed behavior without fully specifying the answer.                        |
| 1375  | [hallucination check](#rune-1375)                   | needs_sense | A skepticism word; it forces the model to verify rather than merely continue.                        |
| 1376  | `STUB` [instruction {AI}](#rune-1376)               | stub        | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                    |
| 1377  | `STUB` [latent space](#rune-1377)                   | stub        | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.         |
| 1378  | `STUB` [memory {AI}](#rune-1378)                    | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1379  | `STUB` [message role](#rune-1379)                   | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1380  | `STUB` [multimodal](#rune-1380)                     | stub        | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.         |
| 1381  | `STUB` [normal form](#rune-1381)                    | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1382  | [objective](#rune-1382)                             | authored    | The outcome the spell is trying to cause.                                                            |
| 1383  | [output contract](#rune-1383)                       | authored    | The required shape the answer must take.                                                             |
| 1384  | `STUB` [parser prompt](#rune-1384)                  | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1385  | `STUB` [plan](#rune-1385)                           | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1386  | [planner](#rune-1386)                               | needs_sense | A sequencing word; it arranges acts before they are executed.                                        |
| 1387  | `STUB` [policy prompt](#rune-1387)                  | stub        | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                    |
| 1388  | `STUB` [procedure {AI}](#rune-1388)                 | stub        | A method word; not just what to do, but in what order to do it.                                      |
| 1389  | [prompt](#rune-1389)                                | authored    | The surface instruction that biases a model toward task, role, and style.                            |
| 1390  | `STUB` [prompt injection](#rune-1390)               | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1391  | `STUB` [prompt surface {AI}](#rune-1391)            | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1392  | `STUB` [ranking](#rune-1392)                        | stub        | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                    |
| 1393  | `STUB` [reasoning trace](#rune-1393)                | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1394  | [reranker](#rune-1394)                              | needs_sense | A refinement word; candidates are reordered after an earlier retrieval pass.                         |
| 1395  | [retrieval](#rune-1395)                             | authored    | Bring external evidence into the model's working context.                                            |
| 1396  | `STUB` [retrieval-augmented generation](#rune-1396) | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1397  | `STUB` [role {AI}](#rune-1397)                      | stub        | An invocation word; it frames what kind of actor the model should pretend to be.                     |
| 1398  | `STUB` [rubric](#rune-1398)                         | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1399  | `STUB` [safety rail](#rune-1399)                    | stub        | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.         |
| 1400  | `STUB` [scaffold {AI}](#rune-1400)                  | stub        | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                    |
| 1401  | `STUB` [schema {AI}](#rune-1401)                    | stub        | A shape word for stored meaning.                                                                     |
| 1402  | `STUB` [section marker](#rune-1402)                 | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1403  | `STUB` [self-check](#rune-1403)                     | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1404  | `STUB` [shot](#rune-1404)                           | stub        | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                    |
| 1405  | [spell](#rune-1405)                                 | authored    | A structured instruction artifact that binds role, goal, context, and checks.                        |
| 1406  | [spell number](#rune-1406)                          | needs_sense | A Godel-style identifier for a canonicalized spell sequence.                                         |
| 1407  | [spell signature](#rune-1407)                       | needs_sense | A canonical token sequence or prime-exponent form standing in for an entire prompt.                  |
| 1408  | `STUB` [step list](#rune-1408)                      | stub        | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.         |
| 1409  | [system prompt](#rune-1409)                         | authored    | The highest-order framing instruction in the conversation.                                           |
| 1410  | `STUB` [task framing](#rune-1410)                   | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1411  | [temperature](#rune-1411)                           | needs_sense | A variance word in sampling; higher values loosen the model's preference ordering.                   |
| 1412  | `STUB` [token {AI}](#rune-1412)                     | stub        | A countable unit of text or symbol used for parsing, modeling, or encoding.                          |
| 1413  | `STUB` [token stream](#rune-1413)                   | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1414  | [tool call](#rune-1414)                             | authored    | A step where the model reaches beyond text into external action.                                     |
| 1415  | `STUB` [toolformer pattern](#rune-1415)             | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1416  | `STUB` [top-k](#rune-1416)                          | stub        | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response. |
| 1417  | `STUB` [top-p](#rune-1417)                          | stub        | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.         |
| 1418  | `STUB` [user prompt](#rune-1418)                    | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |
| 1419  | [verification {AI}](#rune-1419)                     | authored    | Truth-checking added to output generation.                                                           |
| 1420  | `STUB` [vocabulary id](#rune-1420)                  | stub        | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                          |

## Entries

### [1351] agent {AI} {#rune-1351}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A named locus of initiative that may observe, decide, and invoke tools.

**Shadow:** agent can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** A named locus of initiative that may observe, decide, and invoke tools.

### [1352] alignment {AI} {#rune-1352}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** alignment can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1353] annotation set {#rune-1353}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** annotation set can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1354] benchmark prompt {#rune-1354}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** benchmark prompt can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1355] canonical form {AI} {#rune-1355}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A normalization word; many possible surfaces are forced into one agreed shape.

**Shadow:** canonical form can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1356] citation {#rune-1356}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** citation can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1357] clause marker {#rune-1357}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** clause marker can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1358] constraint {AI} {#rune-1358}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A bound that removes degrees of freedom in favor of correctness.

**Shadow:** constraint can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** A bound that removes degrees of freedom in favor of correctness.

### [1359] context {#rune-1359}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The surrounding facts that give the prompt its force.

**Shadow:** context can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The surrounding facts that give the prompt its force.

### [1360] context window {#rune-1360}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** needs_sense

**Force:** A horizon word; it marks how much text the model can keep active at once.

**Shadow:** context window can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1361] delegation {#rune-1361}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.

**Shadow:** delegation can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1362] deterministic decoding {#rune-1362}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** deterministic decoding can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1363] embedding {AI} {#rune-1363}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A closeness word; it places meaning into geometry.

**Shadow:** embedding can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1364] evaluation {AI} {#rune-1364}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The act of measuring whether the model is actually useful.

**Shadow:** evaluation can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The act of measuring whether the model is actually useful.

### [1365] evaluator {#rune-1365}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** evaluator can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1366] example {#rune-1366}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.

**Shadow:** example can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1367] exemplar {#rune-1367}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.

**Shadow:** exemplar can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1368] fallback {AI} {#rune-1368}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.

**Shadow:** fallback can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1369] few-shot {#rune-1369}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** few-shot can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1370] fine-tuning {#rune-1370}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.

**Shadow:** fine-tuning can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1371] function call {#rune-1371}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.

**Shadow:** function call can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1372] goal {#rune-1372}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** needs_sense

**Force:** An aim word; it tells the spell what outcome matters most.

**Shadow:** goal can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1373] grounding {#rune-1373}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Tie generation to evidence instead of to free-association alone.

**Shadow:** grounding can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** Tie generation to evidence instead of to free-association alone.

### [1374] guardrail {#rune-1374}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A boundary that narrows allowed behavior without fully specifying the answer.

**Shadow:** guardrail can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** A boundary that narrows allowed behavior without fully specifying the answer.

### [1375] hallucination check {#rune-1375}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** needs_sense

**Force:** A skepticism word; it forces the model to verify rather than merely continue.

**Shadow:** hallucination check can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1376] instruction {AI} {#rune-1376}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.

**Shadow:** instruction can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1377] latent space {#rune-1377}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.

**Shadow:** latent space can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1378] memory {AI} {#rune-1378}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** memory can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1379] message role {#rune-1379}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** message role can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1380] multimodal {#rune-1380}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.

**Shadow:** multimodal can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1381] normal form {#rune-1381}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** normal form can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1382] objective {#rune-1382}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The outcome the spell is trying to cause.

**Shadow:** objective can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The outcome the spell is trying to cause.

### [1383] output contract {#rune-1383}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The required shape the answer must take.

**Shadow:** output contract can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The required shape the answer must take.

### [1384] parser prompt {#rune-1384}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** parser prompt can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1385] plan {#rune-1385}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** plan can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1386] planner {#rune-1386}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** needs_sense

**Force:** A sequencing word; it arranges acts before they are executed.

**Shadow:** planner can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1387] policy prompt {#rune-1387}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.

**Shadow:** policy prompt can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1388] procedure {AI} {#rune-1388}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A method word; not just what to do, but in what order to do it.

**Shadow:** procedure can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1389] prompt {#rune-1389}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The surface instruction that biases a model toward task, role, and style.

**Shadow:** prompt can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The surface instruction that biases a model toward task, role, and style.

### [1390] prompt injection {#rune-1390}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** prompt injection can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1391] prompt surface {AI} {#rune-1391}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** prompt surface can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1392] ranking {#rune-1392}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.

**Shadow:** ranking can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1393] reasoning trace {#rune-1393}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** reasoning trace can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1394] reranker {#rune-1394}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** needs_sense

**Force:** A refinement word; candidates are reordered after an earlier retrieval pass.

**Shadow:** reranker can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1395] retrieval {#rune-1395}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Bring external evidence into the model's working context.

**Shadow:** retrieval can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** Bring external evidence into the model's working context.

### [1396] retrieval-augmented generation {#rune-1396}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** retrieval-augmented generation can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1397] role {AI} {#rune-1397}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An invocation word; it frames what kind of actor the model should pretend to be.

**Shadow:** role can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1398] rubric {#rune-1398}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** rubric can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1399] safety rail {#rune-1399}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.

**Shadow:** safety rail can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1400] scaffold {AI} {#rune-1400}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.

**Shadow:** scaffold can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1401] schema {AI} {#rune-1401}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A shape word for stored meaning.

**Shadow:** schema can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1402] section marker {#rune-1402}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** section marker can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1403] self-check {#rune-1403}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** self-check can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1404] shot {#rune-1404}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.

**Shadow:** shot can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1405] spell {#rune-1405}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A structured instruction artifact that binds role, goal, context, and checks.

**Shadow:** spell can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** A structured instruction artifact that binds role, goal, context, and checks.

### [1406] spell number {#rune-1406}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** needs_sense

**Force:** A Godel-style identifier for a canonicalized spell sequence.

**Shadow:** spell number can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1407] spell signature {#rune-1407}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** needs_sense

**Force:** A canonical token sequence or prime-exponent form standing in for an entire prompt.

**Shadow:** spell signature can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1408] step list {#rune-1408}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.

**Shadow:** step list can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1409] system prompt {#rune-1409}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The highest-order framing instruction in the conversation.

**Shadow:** system prompt can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The highest-order framing instruction in the conversation.

### [1410] task framing {#rune-1410}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** task framing can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1411] temperature {#rune-1411}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** needs_sense

**Force:** A variance word in sampling; higher values loosen the model's preference ordering.

**Shadow:** temperature can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1412] token {AI} {#rune-1412}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A countable unit of text or symbol used for parsing, modeling, or encoding.

**Shadow:** token can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1413] token stream {#rune-1413}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** token stream can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1414] tool call {#rune-1414}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A step where the model reaches beyond text into external action.

**Shadow:** tool call can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** A step where the model reaches beyond text into external action.

### [1415] toolformer pattern {#rune-1415}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** toolformer pattern can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1416] top-k {#rune-1416}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.

**Shadow:** top-k can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1417] top-p {#rune-1417}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.

**Shadow:** top-p can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1418] user prompt {#rune-1418}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** user prompt can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

### [1419] verification {AI} {#rune-1419}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Truth-checking added to output generation.

**Shadow:** verification can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** Truth-checking added to output generation.

### [1420] vocabulary id {#rune-1420}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.

**Shadow:** vocabulary id can become a prompt-shaped decoration unless it changes output, evidence, or tool behavior.
